message.content: I want you to add some extra links to the project in case users need help. First, I want you to update the headers link. Add a new link to our Discord community. The URL for the link is https://discord.gg/ruMJaQqVKa . I also want you to edit the GitHub link to point to the endorhq/capsule project so users can star it right away. Add a cute start icon to the Github link and convert it to a button. Then, add the Discord link and a link to the github issue when there's an error loading a session, suggesting the user to open an issue or join the community to share failing sessions with the team. They can also use the CLI export command (npx @endorhq/capsule share).

content.text: Let me start by exploring the codebase to understand the current header and error handling components.

input.prompt:
I need to find:
1. The header component that contains links (likely a navbar/header with a GitHub link)
2. Any error handling UI that shows when a session fails to load
3. The current GitHub link URL and how it's structured

Search thoroughly in packages/web/src/lib/components/ and packages/web/src/routes/ for:
- Header, navbar, or top bar components
- GitHub links
- Error states related to session loading
- Any existing Discord links

Return the full file paths and relevant code snippets with line numbers.

content.text:
Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the header, error handling, and link structure. Let me compile my findings: ## Summary of Findings ### 1. **Header Component** **File:** `/home/user/Workspace/capsule/packages/web/src/lib/components/Header.svelte` The header contains the following links: **GitHub Link (Lines 34-41):** ```svelte GitHub ``` **Docs Link (Lines 26-33):** ```svelte Docs ``` **Logo/Brand Link (Lines 9-15):** ```svelte ``` **Key Details:** - GitHub URL is: `https://github.com/endorhq` - Located in the right nav section at lines 25-42 - Styled as a text link with hover effects (`:hover:text-accent`) - Opens in new tab with `target="_blank"` and security attributes --- ### 2. **Error Handling UI for Session Loading** **File:** `/home/user/Workspace/capsule/packages/web/src/lib/components/MainContent.svelte` **Error Display Block (Lines 156-187):** ```svelte {:else if activeMeta && activeParseState.parseError}
// failed to load session

The file {activeMeta.name} could not be parsed. It may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. 

{activeParseState.parseError}
``` **Key Details:** - Error state is tracked via `activeParseState.parseError` (line 156) - Displays: error message header, user-friendly description, detailed error in a code block, and two action buttons [retry] and [delete session] - Uses red status color (`text-status-error`) for error text - Error message is generated from parsing failures with fallback: `'Failed to parse session'` (MainContent.svelte line 118) --- ### 3. **Footer Component** **File:** `/home/user/Workspace/capsule/packages/web/src/lib/components/Footer.svelte` Contains company links: - Copyright statement (line 5) - Terms of Service link: `https://endor.dev/terms` (lines 7-14) - EULA link: `https://endor.dev/eula` (lines 16-23) - About link: `https://endor.dev/` (lines 25-32) **No Discord link exists** in the current codebase - search returned no results. --- ### 4. **Gist Loading Error Handling** **File:** `/home/user/Workspace/capsule/packages/web/src/lib/components/UploadZone.svelte` **Error Display (Lines 185-187):** ```svelte {#if gistError}

{gistError}

{/if} ``` Displays gist loading errors when a GitHub Gist URL fails to load. --- ### 5. **Links Summary** | Link Type | URL | Location | Status | |-----------|-----|----------|--------| | **GitHub** | `https://github.com/endorhq` | Header nav (line 35) | Active | | **Docs** | `https://docs.endor.dev` | Header nav (line 27) | Active | | **Brand/Logo** | `https://capsule.endor.dev` | Header (line 10) | Active | | **Terms** | `https://endor.dev/terms` | Footer (line 8) | Active | | **EULA** | `https://endor.dev/eula` | Footer (line 17) | Active | | **About** | `https://endor.dev/` | Footer (line 26) | Active | | **Discord** | N/A | N/A | Not found | All absolute file paths are provided above with line numbers for easy reference.

content.text:
Everything type-checks cleanly. Here's a summary of the changes:

**Header.svelte** (`packages/web/src/lib/components/Header.svelte`):
- Added a **Discord** link pointing to `https://discord.gg/ruMJaQqVKa`
- Changed the GitHub link URL from `https://github.com/endorhq` to `https://github.com/endorhq/capsule`
- Converted the GitHub link into a **button-style element** with a rounded border and a star icon (SVG), labeled "Star on GitHub"

**MainContent.svelte** (`packages/web/src/lib/components/MainContent.svelte`):
- Added a new section below the `[retry]` / `[delete session]` buttons in the parse error state, separated by a top border
- The section suggests users **open a GitHub issue** (links to `endorhq/capsule/issues`) or **join the Discord** community to share failing sessions
- Also mentions the CLI command `npx @endorhq/capsule share` as an alternative way to share sessions with the team
